summary: Regression testing after performance optimizations completed. All 18 features tested and PASSED. The app is 100% client-side and all ML features work correctly with identical outputs after the optimizations (loop-based min/max, optimized decision tree findBestSplit, KNN bounded insertion sort, random forest voting, extractImportance Map lookup, CSV parsing reuse).

issues: AnimatePresence warning: multiple children animation - no functional impact
validateDOMNesting warning: div in p (Badge component) - minor HTML issue, no functional impact

critical_code_review_comments: 1. arrayMin/arrayMax/arrayMinMax functions (lines 79-81) - loop-based alternatives to Math.min/max(...bigArray)
2. Decision tree findBestSplit optimization (lines 299-315) - reusable scratch array, pre-sorted indices
3. KNN bounded insertion sort (lines 466-479) - maintains sorted buffer of k nearest instead of sorting all
4. Random forest voting optimization (lines 449-456) - tracks best vote during iteration
5. extractImportance Map lookup (lines 546-548) - uses Map for O(1) feature index lookup
6. CSV parsing reuse (line 945) - reuses dataProfile.rows instead of re-parsing
All outputs remain functionally identical - classification/regression metrics, SHAP/LIME values, clustering results unchanged
seed_data_creation: Used built-in sample datasets: Loan Approval (20 rows, classification), House Prices (15 rows, regression)

XAI tabs: 'SHAP Analysis', 'LIME Explanation', 'Cluster Explanation'. Unsupervised requires selecting 'No target (Unsupervised Learning)' option.
